title: AI Governance Agent — Audit Log Payload
description: Schema for the HTTP request body sent by the Python audit logger (audit_logger.py) to the Power Automate cloud flow. The flow receives this payload and writes a new item to the SharePoint 'AI Governance Audit Log' list.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the query (e.g. 2024-11-01T03:22:45.123456+00:00)

session_id.description: UUID identifying the conversation session. Groups related query-response turns in the audit log.

query.description: The user's raw question as submitted to the agent.
query.example: What are the prohibited AI practices under the EU AI Act?

response.description: The agent's generated answer, or the escalation message if no chunks met the confidence threshold.
response.example: Under Article 5 of the EU AI Act, the following AI practices are prohibited...

confidence_band.description: Confidence classification based on the top reranker score: High (>=0.85), Medium (0.70–0.84), Escalated (<0.70).

top_score.description: The Azure AI Search semantic reranker score of the highest-ranked retrieved chunk. Scale is 0–4; filtered at 0.7 threshold.

escalated.description: True if the query was escalated (no chunks met the 0.7 confidence threshold). False if a grounded response was generated.

citations.description: List of source documents cited in the response. Empty array when escalated=true.

source_url.description: Relative path of the source document within the knowledge base, or a URL.

chunk_index.description: Zero-based index of the chunk within the source document.

_implementation_notes.power_automate_trigger: HTTP trigger (When an HTTP request is received). Paste this schema into the 'Request Body JSON Schema' field to auto-generate dynamic content tokens.
sharepoint_list_columns: Title          (Single line of text)  → maps to session_id
Citations      (Multiple lines of text — JSON string)
_implementation_notes.authentication: Use Azure AD app registration with Sites.ReadWrite.All Graph permission, or configure the SharePoint connector in Power Automate with a service account.
_implementation_notes.error_handling: The Python audit_logger.py writes locally first. If the Power Automate flow returns a non-2xx response, the error is logged as a warning and the query pipeline continues.
